    A

    applicationMain - package applicationMain
    Core application classes, validation utilities, and TP2 test harnesses.

    C

    clearAllPosts() - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Utility for tests to reset all stored posts.
    clearSubset() - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Clears all subset results.
    createPost(Post) - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Creates a post after validating all required fields.

    D

    deletePost(int) - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Deletes a post by id.

    E

    entityClasses - package entityClasses
    Domain entities for the discussion system, including posts, replies, and user-related models.

    F

    FoundationsF25 - module FoundationsF25
     

    G

    getAuthorAsuUserId() - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Returns the ASU user id of the post author.
    getBody() - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Returns the current post body text.
    getCourseTag() - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Returns the course tag used for this post.
    getPostId() - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Returns this post's unique identifier.
    getTitle() - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Returns the current post title.

    H

    HW2CrudValidationTest - Class in applicationMain
    Semi-automated validation test suite for TP2 student post and reply workflows.
    HW2CrudValidationTest() - Constructor for class applicationMain.HW2CrudValidationTest
     

    I

    isResolved() - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Indicates whether this post is marked resolved.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class applicationMain.HW2CrudValidationTest
    Executes all built-in test cases in deterministic order.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class applicationMain.UsernameValidationTest
    Executes a sequence of username validation checks.

    P

    Post - Class in entityClasses
    Represents a discussion post and provides class-level CRUD operations for post management.
    Post(int, String, String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class entityClasses.Post
    Creates a new post with all required domain attributes.

    R

    readAllPosts() - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Reads all posts as a defensive copy.
    readPostById(int) - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Reads a post by its unique id.
    readSubsetPosts() - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Reads the current subset view as a defensive copy.

    S

    setAuthorAsuUserId(String) - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Updates the ASU user id of the post author.
    setBody(String) - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Updates the post body text.
    setCourseTag(String) - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Updates the course tag used for this post.
    setPostId(int) - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Updates this post's unique identifier.
    setResolved(boolean) - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Updates the resolved state of this post.
    setSubsetFromCourseTag(String) - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Builds a subset using course tag equality (case-insensitive).
    setSubsetFromKeyword(String) - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Builds a subset from keyword matches in title or body.
    setTitle(String) - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Updates the post title.

    U

    updatePost(int, String, String, String, boolean) - Static method in class entityClasses.Post
    Updates an existing post.
